research_history_boundary.support_only_values_seen: feature distributions and event counts; no entry-to-exit price, future OHLC, funding PnL, return, CAGR, or MDD

nearest_failed_families.NETF: event-breadth versus capital disagreement and revelation
nearest_failed_families.LVRT: arrival/HHI shock followed by opposite-flow reversal

novelty_boundary.distinct_axis: the inclusive underlying-trade-ID span compressed into each public aggregate-trade event is the primary state

source_contract.source_gap_policy: quarantine each verified source-ID-gap UTC day, every missing feature bucket, and the next 24 five-minute bars; never impute

claim_boundary.claim: a rare coherent sweep with unusually many underlying trade IDs per aggregate event and aligned same-bucket price response may represent information diffusion that persists for twelve hours
not_claimed: direct observation of one parent order
every integer in the first/last trade-ID span is one causal fill

causal_feature_contract.direction: d = sign(signed_quote_notional[t]); d must be nonzero
causal_feature_contract.baseline: all thresholds use only clean t-8640..t-1 observations and require at least 2016 observations
causal_feature_contract.episode: eligible at t and ineligible at t-1

execution_contract.entry: t+2 open, leaving one full five-minute computation bar
execution_contract.exit: scheduled open after 144 held five-minute bars
execution_contract.funding: exact realized BTCUSDT settlement rates on [entry, exit)
execution_contract.strict_mdd: global/pre-entry high-water; entry cost; favorable-before-adverse held OHLC; exact funding; hypothetical liquidation and exit cost
execution_contract.cagr_clock: full wall-clock split including warm-up and idle cash

support_freeze_before_returns.required_path: signal, reserved compute bar, entry, every held bucket, and exit must stay inside the split and outside quarantine
support_freeze_before_returns.failure_action: reject without opening any strategy outcome

falsification_controls.direction_flip: same candidate clock, exact opposite side
falsification_controls.no_compression: own clock with compression threshold removed
falsification_controls.no_coherence: own clock with coherence threshold removed
falsification_controls.no_aligned_response: own clock with response threshold removed
falsification_controls.one_hour_signal_delay: same side and hold, entry delayed 12 bars
falsification_controls.one_day_shifted_clock: same side and hold, signal shifted 288 bars
falsification_controls.mechanism_gate: primary minimum train/2023 CAGR-MDD must exceed every component removal; time-shift or random-side full qualification rejects

rejection_contract: any support or pre-2024 performance failure retires AFCS-144; do not change its sign, thresholds, delay, hold, costs, or gates
